claims.summary: The active codec is 48D with entropy-gated smooth tail lift and bounded feature ceilings.
claims.disposition: Verified current geometry and corrected the partial-window mapping: projected semantic is 32-39 and narrative arc is 40-43; smoothstep and ceilings have exact tests.

claims.summary: Legacy warmth and hard ceilings may coexist with felt ghosting or affective flattening.
claims.disposition: Preserved as unresolved felt and representation evidence; clamp occupancy or lane energy cannot establish the experience.

claims.summary: Narrative-lane removal and entropy-gate ablation should be compared offline.
claims.disposition: Verified two baseline-first offline campaigns completed with 20 paired narrative journeys and 49 paired gate journeys, found mechanical differences, and retained mechanism_smooth_felt_friction_remains.

claims.summary: Tail lift and feature clamps should vary live by semantic feature type or high-entropy cascade.
claims.disposition: Preserved as an exact Tier 5 operator wait because it changes live codec transport/gain; offline differences and felt friction do not authorize deployment.
